items.title: MoneyGram becomes Solana validator, expands blockchain payments strategy
items.whyYouShouldCare: MoneyGram's entry as a Solana validator enhances the network's credibility and could drive increased transaction volumes in blockchain payments.

items.title: Solana social activity falls 20.7% – TVL raises ONE question for SOL
items.whyYouShouldCare: The 20.7% drop in Solana's social activity raises concerns about user engagement, potentially impacting liquidity and overall ecosystem growth.

items.title: Morgan Stanley amends Ethereum, Solana ETFs to reveal record cheap fees
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's reduction of ETF fees for Ethereum and Solana could attract more institutional investment, improving market dynamics for SOL.
